side_effects.description: Mild chills after using potentially compromised vial; OP notes this could be a common cold and injection site looks completely normal

protocol_notes: Reconstitution incident: rubber stopper popped out briefly due to overpressure when adding BAC water. OP administered 3 pins from the compromised vial (1 on day 1, 2 on day 2) before switching to intranasal route. Ordered replacement vial. Considering oral use to avoid wasting remaining solution.
